{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20970_1
|class_id=20970
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20970_2
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +1<br>Orange Relics: 60/60
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +2<br>Orange Relics: 60/60
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Orange Relics: 60/60
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Orange Relics: 60/60
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Orange Relics: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
